description: Mock application packet: a private used-car sale in Seongnam, filed by the buyer (transferee) directly, with no agent and no acquisition-tax exemption claimed. All values are fabricated illustrative test data, not a real party's information, constructed to exercise the schema's most common branch: registrationReason=sale (vehicleTransferCertificate and transferorIdentityVerificationDocument correctly required; giftDeed/auctionSaleDecisionDocument/certifiedJudgmentCopy correctly not applicable), applicationFiledByAgent=false (agentPowerOfAttorneyAndId correctly not applicable), and no acquisition-tax exemption category checked. vehicleRegistrationCertificate and registrationFee are attached as the two unconditionally required documents.
